events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the view cuts off the exposure area and the crew's position relative to any unprotected edge/opening can't be determined, I marked this `needs_more_info` (not a clean pass, since compliance can't be confirmed) with medium risk, and listed the immediate action of a competent-person field verification before work continues.
